entry.title: Print(HELLO WORLD!)
entry.summary: Initial post to introduce people to my blog and some of the projects.
entry.content:
Hello World

I thought'd open the blog with a classic title from almost all coding tutorials. My original intent with this blog is to keep track of some of the work I've done and will do. I find that just writing things down helps with learning.

Blog Goals

Straight forward. I'm going to blog about my projects. Here's a list of some of the projects I want to tackle
